# supportsPersistentObjectIDs

**Instance Property**

A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports persistent object identifiers and can look up file system objects by their IDs.

## Declaration

```swift
var supportsPersistentObjectIDs: Bool { get set }
```

## Declaring identifier capabilities

- **supports64BitObjectIDs**: A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports 64-bit object IDs.
- **supportsDocumentID**: A Boolean property that indicates whether the volume supports document IDs for document revisions.
